channel.title: Resist on LRG
channel.description: Recent content in Resist on LRG

item.title: Tweet - 1141832713458110465
item.description:
Hmm, do we want the clown or the cad? The self-serving buffoon or the hawk? Both will fight to the death! Oh wait… No, Johnson will win, and Hunt will be given a senior cabinet position. My money’s on home secretary. Besides, most of us don’t get a choice. #Resist

❤️ 1 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 1018747828242350080
item.description:
Beginning to think that Trump supporters don’t really see any collusion with Russia, real or imagined, as much of a problem. In much the same way as they don’t care about the fascism, race hate, misogyny or child abuse. They just see a King. They want to obey. #Resist

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 826699929565421573
item.description:
A friend, living in the US on a visa, was sent this by her lawyer. Looks like I won’t be getting into the States any time soon. #resist

❤️ 0 | 🔃 4
